nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.id: loc-内格罗河-亚马孙河支流-a2458a6f
nodes.name: 内格罗河 (亚马孙河支流)
nodes.summary: 内格罗河 (亚马孙河支流)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联38种鸟类，包括肉垂鳳冠雉、绿尾金喉蜂鸟、Lettered aracari等38种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Fasciated antshrike
nodes.summary: Fasciated antshrike（Fasciated antshrike，学名 Cymbilaimus lineatus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联7个分布地点节点。
locations: 内格罗河 (亚马孙河支流)

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The fasciated antshrike (Cymbilaimus lineatus) is a species of bird in subfamily Thamnophilinae of family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds". It is found in Central America from Honduras south and in every mainland South American country except Argentina, Chile, Paraguay, and Uruguay.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: lineatus is found from eastern Bolívar state in Venezuela east through Guyana and Suriname into French Guiana and south into Amazonian Brazil north of the Amazon between the Branco and Negro rivers. The fasciated antshrike inhabits evergreen forest both primary and secondary in the lowlands and Andean foothills
